subject: Update K8sPlugin API
commit_message:
Update K8sPlugin API

- add new methods for Instance API
- added option to use K8sPlugin without MSB

Issue-ID: TEST-391
Signed-off-by: Lukasz Rajewski <lukasz.rajewski@t-mobile.pl>
Signed-off-by: Michal Jagiello <michal.jagiello@t-mobile.pl>
Change-Id: I35b6c8ba9574ca2385c97edde5dbb036b30aebc9
